channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police strengthen security measures for Miss Universe Philippines 2026 semi-finals in Northern Mindanao
item.description: Authorities in Northern Mindanao have stepped up security preparations ahead of the Miss Universe Philippines 2026 semi-finals set to take place in Misamis Occidental. According to Maj. Joann Navarro,...

item.title: Maktown Flyers secure strong opening win in BAL as Igoche Mark commends team effort
item.description: Popular basketball promoter Igoche Mark don commend Maktown Flyers after dem record an impressive 76–68 win against JCA Kings for their opening match in the 2026 Basketball Africa League (BAL) Sahara ...

item.title: Reports Suggest Kash Patel May Face Removal Amid Controversies and Internal Concerns
item.description: According to a report citing a senior White House official, FBI Director Kash Patel may soon be removed from his position with President Trump’s approval, following a series of negative media reports ...

item.title: K-9 units locate and rescue missing woman after 200-foot fall in San Bernardino Mountains
item.description: Two trained K-9 units from the San Bernardino County Sheriff’s Department played a critical role in rescuing a missing 49-year-old woman who had fallen approximately 200 feet into a steep ravine in th...

item.title: African Court to hear case on Mali’s alleged use of foreign mercenaries in civilian abuses
item.description: The African Court on Human and Peoples’ Rights (ACtHPR), based in Arusha, is set to hear a significant case against the government of Mali concerning alleged human rights violations linked to foreign ...

item.title: PDP Explains Makinde’s Remarks on Historical Political Violence, Accuses APC of Misinterpretation
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) don come out to defend Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, over wetin e talk about the historical 'Operation Wetie'. According to PDP, the governor's words wey dem cla...

item.title: NYSC Member Killed During Armed Robbery Shootout in Abuja
item.description: The Nigerian Army don confirm say one serving NYSC member, Abdulsamad Jamiu, don lose him life during one gunbattle wey happen for Shagari Estate, Dei Dei, Abuja. According to Lieutenant Olawuyi Oduno...

item.title: Russian Africa Corps alleges foreign-backed coup attempt after coordinated attacks in Mali
item.description: Russia Africa Corps, one Russian paramilitary group, don describe the recent coordinated attacks across Mali as an attempted coup, and dem dey accuse Western intelligence services of supporting the op...

item.title: Ouaddou criticises Kaizer Chiefs’ physical approach after Soweto derby draw
item.description: Orlando Pirates head coach Abdeslam Ouaddou voiced strong criticism of Kaizer Chiefs following a tense 1-1 draw in the Soweto derby at FNB Stadium. Although the result keeps Pirates at the top of the ...

item.title: Katsina Residents Prevent Bandits from Entering Gurbi Village
item.description: For Gurbi community wey dey Kankara Local Government Area, Katsina State, dem people show serious courage as dem stop bandits wey try enter their village. Na one resident talk say the bandits waka com...

item.title: Jurupa Valley man dies after medical emergency in Riverside County jail
item.description: A 38-year-old Jurupa Valley resident, identified as Brian Waterman, died after experiencing a medical emergency while in custody at the Robert Presley Detention Center in Riverside County, according t...

item.title: Man Remains Calm During White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
item.description: During the White House Correspondents' Dinner at the Washington Hilton, a shooting incident caused widespread panic among attendees. As a suspected gunman, Cole Allen, 31, opened fire at around 8:15 p...

item.title: Jennifer Lopez, 56, shares workout photos showcasing her toned physique
item.description: Jennifer Lopez, at 56, continues to impress with her fitness routine, showing off her sculpted abs during a Sunday morning gym session. In a recent Instagram post, the Bronx-born singer flaunted her s...

item.title: De Lima Defends House Impeachment Proceedings Against VP Duterte
item.description: Amidst allegations of violating bank secrecy and anti-money laundering laws, House Senior Deputy Minority Leader Leila de Lima firmly stated that the House justice committee's impeachment proceedings ...

item.title: Pakistan's Narrative on Pahalgam Incident Gains International Acceptance, Minister Claims
item.description: Federal Minister for Information and Broadcasting Attaullah Tarar has asserted that Pakistan's perspective on the Pahalgam incident, which occurred a year ago, has finally gained acceptance on the int...

item.title: Construction of BRT Red Line on Karachi's University Road Resumes Under FWO
item.description: The Frontier Works Organisation (FWO) has officially resumed construction on the BRT Red Line project along Karachi’s University Road. Karachi Mayor Murtaza Wahab confirmed that work has restarted jus...

item.title: President Trump discusses his reaction to the White House Correspondents' Dinner security incident
item.description: In an interview with CBS News' '60 Minutes,' President Donald Trump reflected on the security incident that occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where he was swiftly evacuated after sho...

item.title: Unusual Disruption in Panama’s Ocean Upwelling Raises Climate Change Concerns
item.description: For the first time in over four decades, Panama’s crucial ocean upwelling event did not occur in 2025, a surprising disruption that scientists have linked to weakening wind patterns. The seasonal upwe...

item.title: Nigeria Faces Rising Insecurity and Urgent Need for State Policing
item.description: Nigerians dey face serious wahala as insecurity don scatter everywhere for di country. People don dey use humour to cope, even dey twist nursery rhymes to reflect violence: 'A for Axe; B for Bomb; C f...

item.title: Ongoing Middle East Conflict: April 27, 2026 Developments and Updates
item.description: This live updates report from GMA News provides real-time information tungkol sa patuloy na tensyon at armadong labanan sa Middle East as of April 27, 2026. The coverage highlights key developments in...
